summary: Enhanced close_hooks.py with milestone-aware assessment, 'what next' inference, and follow-up task creation capabilities. The system now intelligently recognizes partial task completion and surfaces the next step either from explicit milestones or inferred from task patterns.
new_functions: infer_next_step() - Infers immediate next step based on task structure and progress
create_followup_task() - Creates follow-up task linked to original task
enhanced assess_task_completion() - Returns milestone descriptions, next_step, suggested_action
enhanced generate_close_prompt() - Shows WHAT NEXT and follow-up options
enhanced update_task_from_conversation() - Supports follow-up task creation with create_followup param
patterns_implemented: draft -> review and polish -> finalize -> send/publish
research -> summarize findings -> share/present results -> take action on findings
meet -> send follow-up -> complete action items -> document outcomes
review -> provide feedback -> request revisions -> finalize approval
plan -> execute first step -> review with stakeholders -> begin implementation
email -> await response -> follow up if needed -> schedule next action

enhanced_features.next_step_inference: Priority: explicit milestones > task patterns > generic fallback
enhanced_features.time_estimates: Built-in time estimates for common next step types
enhanced_features.close_prompt: Shows completed work, remaining work, WHAT NEXT with type label, and options
enhanced_features.followup_tasks: Can auto-create follow-up tasks with inherited domain/project/priority

notes_for_orchestrator:
D2.1 should call the new API:
- assess_task_completion() returns milestone descriptions and next_step info
- update_task_from_conversation() accepts create_followup=True to auto-create follow-up
- The prompt shows [followup] option for partial tasks with clear next step
- Task patterns are in TASK_PATTERNS dict at module level
- create_task() must accept parent_task_id parameter for follow-up linking
- Lesson logged: verify task_registry.create_task() accepts parent_task_id parameter

integration_points.thread_close: Should call handle_action_conversation_close() to get enhanced prompt
integration_points.drop_close: Should assess completion and optionally create follow-up task

testing: Created test_close_hooks.py to verify pattern inference, milestone logic, and API structure. All imports successful and pattern matching works correctly.
